```json
[
  {
    "idea": "Freight Rail Car Utilization Collapse Signal",
    "family": "freight_logistics",
    "data": {
      "source": "Association of American Railroads weekly freight car utilization through html_table adapter",
      "type": "scrape",
      "frequency": "weekly",
      "stable": true
    },
    "behavior": "When freight rail car utilization drops sharply week-over-week, it signals inventory drawdown and reduced industrial demand, which precedes market softness.",
    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bearish",
      "sector": "XLI",
      "rationale": "Rail utilization is a leading indicator of manufacturing and goods production momentum."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "If weekly rail car utilization falls more than 3% from prior week and is below its 8-week moving average",
      "exit": "Exit after 10 trading days or if utilization rebounds above 8-week MA for 2 consecutive weeks",
      "expected_frequency": "medium"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "monthly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 24,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "high",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Rail car utilization swings 2-4% weekly; cyclical movements are frequent enough to generate 3-4 setups per quarter."
  },
  {

    "minimum_history_months": 12,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "high",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Charger counts update weekly; sustained national expansion creates multiple regional surge events per month."

    "minimum_history_months": 24,
    "adapter_status": "existing",

    "minimum_history_months": 24,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "high",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Seasonal extremes (winter cold snaps, summer heat waves) produce multiple events per month."
  },

    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "monthly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 12,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "high",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Insurance policy changes and healthcare cost announcements trigger 2-3 search surges per quarter."
  },
  {
    "idea": "Port Container Volume Surge Recovery Rally",
    "family": "freight_logistics",

      "source": "Port Authority container volume data (TEU) weekly through port_container_volume adapter, excluding PoLA already tracked",
      "type": "api",
      "frequency": "weekly",
      "stable": true

    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bullish",
      "sector": "XLI",
      "rationale": "Port container surges indicate inventory restocking and supply chain normalization, signaling demand recovery."

      "entry": "If weekly container volume increases 8% from prior week and is above 8-week moving average",

    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "weekly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 24,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "medium",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Seasonal restocking and demand cycles produce multiple volume surges per quarter."
  },
  {
    "idea": "Airline Load Factor Capacity Crunch Signal",
    "family": "travel_mobility",

      "source": "BTS monthly airline load factor and capacity utilization through bts_airline_load_factor adapter",

    "trigger_sensitivity": "medium",
```
